agent_scopes.mechanism: 5 scopes (highest-first): managed settings (org-wide), CLI --agents flag (session), project (.claude/agents/), user (~/.claude/agents/), plugin; highest-priority wins on name collision

definition_format.mechanism: Markdown files with YAML frontmatter in .claude/agents/ (project) or ~/.claude/agents/ (user); file body becomes system prompt

invocation_patterns.mechanism: natural language (Claude auto-delegates), @agent-<name> @-mention, or --agent flag at startup for session-wide agent; 3 patterns

model_selection.mechanism: model frontmatter field accepts sonnet/opus/haiku alias, full model ID, or inherit (default); per-agent override

per_agent_mcp.mechanism: mcpServers frontmatter field: list of server names referencing already-configured workspace servers or inline server definitions

subagent_spawning.mechanism: main-thread agents spawn subagents via Agent tool; subagents cannot spawn further subagents; Agent(type) in tools allowlist restricts which subagent types are allowed

tool_restrictions.mechanism: tools allowlist and disallowedTools denylist in frontmatter; Agent(type) syntax restricts which subagent types a main-thread agent can spawn

providerExtensions.name: Markdown + YAML Frontmatter Agent Files
providerExtensions.summary: Agents are .md files with YAML frontmatter; body is the system prompt, name and description are the only required fields.

providerExtensions.name: Full Frontmatter Field Set
providerExtensions.summary: Frontmatter supports tools, disallowedTools, model, permissionMode, maxTurns, skills, mcpServers, hooks, memory, background, effort, isolation, color, initialPrompt.

providerExtensions.name: Five Agent Scopes and Priority Ordering
providerExtensions.summary: Five agent scopes (highest first): managed settings, CLI --agents flag, project, user, plugin; highest-priority wins on name collision.

providerExtensions.name: Three Invocation Patterns
providerExtensions.summary: Three invocation patterns: natural language auto-delegation, @agent-<name> mention, or --agent flag for session-wide agent.

providerExtensions.name: Tool Allowlist, Denylist, and Agent-Spawning Restrictions
providerExtensions.summary: tools allowlist, disallowedTools denylist, and Agent(type) syntax restricting which subagent types a main-thread agent may spawn.

providerExtensions.name: Persistent Cross-Session Memory
providerExtensions.summary: Gives an agent a persistent directory (user/project/local scope) seeded with MEMORY.md and Read/Write/Edit tools.

providerExtensions.name: Foreground vs Background Execution
providerExtensions.summary: Agents run foreground (blocking, interactive prompts) or background (concurrent, pre-approved tools); set background: true or press Ctrl+B.

providerExtensions.name: Isolated Git Worktree Execution
providerExtensions.summary: Runs the agent in a temporary git worktree when set to worktree, auto-cleaned if no changes are made.

providerExtensions.name: CLI-Defined Session Agents via --agents Flag
providerExtensions.summary: --agents flag accepts inline JSON agent definitions for the session only (not persisted); useful for testing and automation.

providerExtensions.name: Subagent Resumption
providerExtensions.summary: SendMessage tool resumes existing subagents (gated on CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1); transcripts persist independently of main conversation compaction.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Agent MCP Server Scoping
providerExtensions.summary: Gives an agent inline or referenced MCP servers; inline definitions keep tool descriptions out of the parent context.
